de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.instantiator

Class SVInstantiationCP

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.instantiator.SVInstantiationCP
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Feature

    public class SVInstantiationCP
extends Object
implements Feature
    Feature representing a ChoicePoint for instantiating a schema variable of a taclet with the term that is returned by a ProjectionToTerm. This feature is useful in particular combined with ForEachCP. Although the feature formally is a choice point, it will always have exactly one branch

      • computeCost

        public RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app,
                      PosInOccurrence pos,
                      Goal goal)
        Description copied from interface: Feature
        Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
        Specified by:
        computeCost in interface Feature
        Parameters:
        app - the RuleApp
        pos - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).

      • findSVWithName

        private SchemaVariable findSVWithName(TacletApp app)
